case_title: SUN, HAI VS BERNARD HALDANE ASSO., CAREER MARKETING, INC.

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BERNARD HALDANE ASSO., CAREER MARKETING, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, HAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BERNARD HALDANE ASSO., CAREER MARKETING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-29-1996, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,550.00 FILED BY SUN, HAI AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARD HALDANE ASSO., CAREER MARKETING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO BERNARD HALDANE ASSOC. CAREER MARKETING INC. RETURNED ADDRESSEE UNKNOWN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN, HAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERNARD HALDANE ASSO., CAREER MARKETING, INC. $4,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARD HALDANE ASSO., CAREER MARKETING, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-27-1996, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-19-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
